title: Cubed Pack
description: A modpack designed around the Cubed Textures resource pack
body:
--- ### IMPORTANT: This pack requires OptiFine! **The license of OptiFine doesn't allow us to add it to the modpack, meaning you'll have to add it yourself.** **All you need to do is download [OptiFine_1.14.4_HD_U_F5](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.14.4_HD_U_F5.jar) and add it to the mods of this pack. (Don't run the installer) The newer 1.14.4 OptiFine version G5 has multiple annoying bugs and is not recommended.** ---
![Banner](https://imgur.com/AwjpuhK.gif) # Cubed Pack The Cubed Pack is designed around the [Cubed Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubed-textures) resource pack. Cubed Textures is a realistic Minecraft resource pack made for building enthusiasts and aspiring architects. Over 100 unique models, 300+ new textures, Custom Item Models and more. Our many unique features provide an in-depth building experience, with styles ranging from medieval and traditional to modern. Cubed Textures uses BlockStates and Biomes to add many textures and models to the game. Technically you don't need any mods except for OptiFine to build with this resource pack. However in singleplayer this can become a bit tricky when trying to build with the many redstone and noteblock textures. That's where this modpack comes in, it includes a few mods which will make it a lot easier to build with all the textures this pack has to offer! The Cubed Pack includes: - [Cubed Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubed-textures) (enabled by default) - [Cubed Dark UI Overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubed-textures-overlay) (included but not enabled) - Pre-set OptiFine options (connected textures and fancy trees etc enabled by default) - [Cubed Repository World](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/cubed-textures-pack-repository-download-1-14-4/) in saves - Cubed Community Server in server list - All mods needed for the best out of the box singleplayer experience - Client side mods that are useful for both singleplayer and multiplayer For issues or assistance, please [join our Discord](https://cubed.community/discord)
﻿[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/gQWEz6f.png)](https://cubed.community/discord) | [![GitHub](https://i.imgur.com/iztLhFG.png)](https://github.com/cubedcommunity/CubedTextures) | [![Models](https://i.imgur.com/PLUKfyL.png)](https://cubed.community/texturepack) :-------------------------:|:-------------------------:|:-------------------------:
